name: Chicken and Mushrooms with Basil Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken pieces with salt and pepper.
2. Dredge the chicken in flour.
3. In a heavy skillet, sauté the chicken in butter and oil until golden brown.
4. Transfer the chicken to a casserole dish.
5. In a bowl, combine basil with minced garlic cloves mashed into a smooth paste, Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper. Blend the sauce until smooth.
6. In another heavy skillet, sauté bread slices in butter until golden brown. Transfer to paper towels to drain excess fat.
7. In a separate skillet, sauté mushrooms in oil for 3-4 minutes until golden brown.
8. Add the mushroom mixture and sauce to the chicken in the casserole dish. Simmer for 3 minutes.
9. Pour the mushroom mixture over the chicken and warm through.
10. Serve with bread.
